summary: Beware of HDFC refund scam calls in Whitefield, asking for OTP, which can lead to financial loss.
action_steps: Do not share OTP with unknown callers
Verify HDFC calls through official numbers
Report suspicious calls to local authorities
reasoning: Report mentions a specific incident with a named bank, method, location, and documented financial loss. High credibility.
source_text: Watch out for Refund Scam calls in Whitefield! Caller pretends to be HDFC, asks for OTP. My neighbour lost 40,000 rupees yesterday. Please warn seniors.

summary: Two-wheeler stolen from Brookfield Signal parking area during early morning hours.
action_steps: Check building CCTV footage between 1am and 3am
File FIR at Whitefield Police Station
Avoid parking vehicles in unlit areas overnight
reasoning: Specific time, location, and vehicle details provided. FIR already filed, indicating a verified incident.
source_text: Two-wheeler theft near Brookfield Signal at 2am last night. Dark Honda Activa, no helmet. Filing FIR at Whitefield PS. Check your building CCTV.

summary: Unknown individual photographing vehicles in residential parking lot on multiple evenings.
action_steps: Note the person's description and timing if seen again
Inform building security immediately
Do not confront the individual directly
reasoning: Recurring suspicious behaviour reported over multiple evenings. No confirmed crime yet but warrants community awareness.
source_text: Unfamiliar person has been photographing cars in our parking lot for the past two evenings around 7pm. Wearing a blue jacket. Security seems unaware.

summary: Phishing SMS impersonating BESCOM circulating among residents requesting account updates.
action_steps: Do not click any links in the SMS
Report the number to TRAI at 1909
Verify any BESCOM communication through their official website
reasoning: Known phishing pattern impersonating a utility provider. Multiple residents received the same SMS, indicating an organised campaign.
source_text: Phishing SMS going around impersonating BESCOM asking for account update. Three residents in our building received it. Do not click the link.

summary: Active fire reported on third floor of Prestige Tower with residents potentially trapped.
action_steps: Call 101 (Fire) immediately if not already done
Evacuate via staircases — do not use lifts
Assemble at the designated muster point
Do not re-enter the building
reasoning: Active emergency with potential for physical harm. Immediate action required. Classified Critical due to ongoing nature of the incident.
source_text: There is a fire on the 3rd floor of Prestige Tower right now. Smoke coming from flat 302. People may be trapped. Fire brigade called but not arrived yet.

summary: Personal complaint about a neighbour playing loud music — no community safety concern identified.
reasoning: This is a personal dispute between residents. No safety threat to the broader community. Classified as noise.
source_text: The uncle in flat 304 plays loud music every single night until 1am. Management does nothing. I pay 40k rent for this! Someone do something!!

summary: Vague and unverifiable report of a possible scam with no supporting details.
reasoning: No specific details, location, victim, or incident. Entirely speculative language used throughout. Cannot be acted upon.
source_text: I think I heard something weird outside last night, maybe a scam or someone suspicious? Not sure, could be wind. Be careful I guess?

summary: Stagnant water reported near Block D creating potential dengue breeding ground.
action_steps: Report to BBMP sanitation helpline: 1533
Avoid the area if possible
Check for stagnant water in flower pots and overhead tanks in your flat
reasoning: Stagnant water is a known dengue vector. Specific location provided. Actionable by both residents and civic authorities.
source_text: There is stagnant water collecting near the drain behind Block D for over a week now. Mosquitoes are breeding there. Someone needs to report this to BBMP.

summary: Individual posing as electricity department employee visiting homes without valid ID.
action_steps: Do not allow entry without verified ID
Call BESCOM on 1912 to confirm if any visits are scheduled
Inform building security of the description
reasoning: Common pretext used for theft or scoping properties. Specific building and behaviour described. Warrants community alert.
source_text: Someone knocked on multiple doors in Block C claiming to be from the electricity department without showing an ID card. Looked suspicious.

summary: Street lights on stretch between Metro station and residential gate non-functional for one week.
action_steps: Use the well-lit parallel road after dark as an alternative
Report to BBMP via the Sahaaya app or call 1533
Walk in groups at night until resolved
reasoning: Infrastructure issue with a safety dimension for pedestrians at night. Not an immediate threat but warrants advisory.
source_text: Street lights on the stretch between the Metro station and our gate have been out for a week. Very dark at night. Please report to BBMP.
